message:
fix(runtime): harden walking skeleton with region recycling, hook defaults, and Makefile wiring (bd-ix8.8)

- Add hooks.c to RUNTIME_SRC in Makefile (was missing from build)
- Implement region slot recycling in lifecycle.c (reuse CLOSED slots)
- Align hooks.c with deterministic-safe defaults: logical clock, seeded
  PRNG, ghost reactor; log sink is opt-in (NULL)
- Use proper error codes: ASX_E_DETERMINISM_VIOLATION for det-mode
  violations, ASX_E_ALLOCATOR_SEALED for post-seal alloc, non-idempotent seal
- Fix runtime_hooks_test.c to match hook contract (ghost_wait_fn default,
  log silent when missing)
- Update test_hooks.c expectations for deterministic-safe init defaults

All 91 tests pass (80 unit + 11 invariant) with -Werror.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,6 +115,7 @@ CORE_SRC := \
 	src/core/cancel.c
 
 RUNTIME_SRC := \
+	src/runtime/hooks.c \
 	src/runtime/lifecycle.c \
 	src/runtime/scheduler.c \
 	src/runtime/cancellation.c \
